measuredCost: 18 exact rows: 14 private Upstash facade occurrences and four framework/HTTP adapter occurrences. Repetition is visible but local, reviewable, and covered by the real audit.
rationale: No semantic or generated replacement was supplied that reduces carrying cost while preserving all four properties against current source. The existing representation remains the safer and earlier durable owner; line-count reduction is not an accepted outcome.
nonClaims: Retention does not prove that the registry has no maintenance cost or can never be replaced.
No file- or symbol-level admission, inferred wildcard, provider state, or external authority is introduced.
